versions.version_description: Designed for beginners. Keep pinky finger down during G, Em7 and Cadd9 to smooth the sound.

tuning: E A D G B E

recommended.version_description: It's just capo on 3 and Em C B7 the whole way through.

content:
Beautiful Soul - Jesse McCartney
No Capo

[Intro]

[ch]A[/ch] [ch]E[/ch] [ch]F#m[/ch] [ch]D[/ch]
[ch]A[/ch] [ch]E[/ch] [ch]F#m[/ch] [ch]D[/ch]


[Chorus]

[tab]                       [ch]A[/ch]      [ch]E[/ch]
I don't want another pretty face[/tab]
[tab]                   [ch]F#m[/ch]       [ch]D[/ch]
I don't want just anyone to hold[/tab]
[tab]                  [ch]F#m[/ch]             [ch]E[/ch]
I don't want my love to go to waste[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]A[/ch]       [ch]A/C#[/ch]  [ch]D[/ch]
I want you and your  beautiful soul[/tab]


[Instrumental]

[ch]A[/ch] [ch]E[/ch] [ch]F#m[/ch] [ch]D[/ch]


[Verse 1]

[tab][ch]A[/ch]   [ch]E[/ch]       [ch]F#m[/ch]     [ch]D[/ch] 
I know that you are something special[/tab]
[tab][ch]A[/ch]   [ch]E[/ch]      [ch]F#m[/ch]   [ch]D[/ch]     
To you I'd be always faithful[/tab]
[tab][ch]A[/ch]   [ch]E[/ch]     [ch]F#m[/ch]  [ch]D[/ch]
I want to be what you always needed[/tab]
[tab][ch]A[/ch]       [ch]E[/ch]                  [ch]F#m[/ch]      [ch]D[/ch]
Then I hope you'll see the heart in me[/tab]
 

[Chorus]

[tab]                       [ch]A[/ch]      [ch]E[/ch]
I don't want another pretty face[/tab]
[tab]                   [ch]F#m[/ch]        [ch]D[/ch]
I don't want just anyone to hold[/tab]
[tab]                 [ch]F#m[/ch]              [ch]E[/ch]
I don't want my love to go to waste[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]A[/ch]        [ch]A/C#[/ch]   [ch]D[/ch]
I want you and your beautiful soul[/tab]
[tab]            [ch]A[/ch]            [ch]E[/ch]
You're the one I wanna chase[/tab]
[tab]           [ch]F#m[/ch]           [ch]D[/ch]
You're the one I wanna hold[/tab]
[tab]                      [ch]F#m[/ch]            [ch]E[/ch]
I won't let another minute go to waste[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]A[/ch]       [ch]A/C#[/ch]  [ch]D[/ch]             [ch]A[/ch] [ch]E[/ch] [ch]F#m[/ch] [ch]D[/ch]
I want you and your  beautiful soul[/tab]
[tab]            [ch]A[/ch]    [ch]E[/ch]  [ch]F#m[/ch]  [ch]D[/ch]
Your beautiful soul, yeah[/tab]


[Verse 2]

[tab][ch]A[/ch]     [ch]E[/ch]        [ch]F#m[/ch]    [ch]D[/ch]
You might need time to think it over[/tab]
[tab][ch]A[/ch]    [ch]E[/ch]       [ch]F#m[/ch]  [ch]D[/ch]
But I'm just fine moving forward[/tab]
[tab][ch]A[/ch]     [ch]E[/ch]        [ch]F#m[/ch]          [ch]D[/ch]
I'll ease your mind if you give me the chance[/tab]
[tab][ch]A[/ch]             [ch]E[/ch]            [ch]F#m[/ch]         [ch]D[/ch]
I will never make you cry c`mon let's try[/tab]


[Chorus]

[tab]                       [ch]A[/ch]      [ch]E[/ch]
I don't want another pretty face[/tab]
[tab]                   [ch]F#m[/ch]        [ch]D[/ch]
I don't want just anyone to hold[/tab]
[tab]                 [ch]F#m[/ch]              [ch]E[/ch]
I don't want my love to go to waste[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]A[/ch]       [ch]A/C#[/ch]    [ch]D[/ch]
I want you and your beautiful soul[/tab]
[tab]            [ch]A[/ch]            [ch]E[/ch]
You're the one I wanna chase[/tab]
[tab]           [ch]F#m[/ch]           [ch]D[/ch]
You're the one I wanna hold[/tab]
[tab]                      [ch]F#m[/ch]            [ch]E[/ch]
I won't let another minute go to waste[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]A[/ch]       [ch]A/C#[/ch]  [ch]D[/ch]             [ch]A[/ch] [ch]E[/ch] [ch]F#m[/ch] [ch]D[/ch]
I want you and your  beautiful soul[/tab]
[tab]            [ch]A[/ch]    [ch]E[/ch]  [ch]F#m[/ch]  [ch]D[/ch]
Your beautiful soul, yeah[/tab]


[Bridge]

[tab]      [ch]F#m[/ch]        [ch]D[/ch]
Am I crazy for wanting you?[/tab]
[tab][ch]A[/ch]                             [ch]E[/ch]
Maybe do you think you could want me too?[/tab]
[tab][ch]F#m[/ch]             [ch]E[/ch]          [ch]A[/ch]   [ch]D[/ch]
I don't wanna waste your time[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]F#m[/ch]             [ch]D[/ch]
Do you see things the way I do?[/tab]
[tab][ch]A[/ch]                           [ch]E[/ch]
I just wanna know that you feel it too[/tab]
[tab][ch]F#m[/ch]               [ch]E[/ch]       [ch]A[/ch]   [ch]D[/ch]
There is nothing left to hide[/tab]
 

[Chorus]

[tab]                       [ch]A[/ch]      [ch]E[/ch]
I don't want another pretty face[/tab]
[tab]                   [ch]F#m[/ch]        [ch]D[/ch]
I don't want just anyone to hold[/tab]

I don't want my love to go to waste[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]A[/ch]        [ch]A/C#[/ch]   [ch]D[/ch]
I want you and your beautiful soul[/tab]
[tab]            [ch]A[/ch]            [ch]E[/ch]
You're the one I wanna chase[/tab]
[tab]           [ch]F#m[/ch]           [ch]D[/ch]
You're the one I wanna hold[/tab]
[tab]                      [ch]F#m[/ch]            [ch]E[/ch]
I won't let another minute go to waste[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]A[/ch]       [ch]A/C#[/ch]  [ch]D[/ch]             [ch]A[/ch] [ch]E[/ch] [ch]F#m[/ch] [ch]D[/ch]
I want you and your  beautiful soul[/tab]
[tab]            [ch]A[/ch]    [ch]E[/ch]  [ch]F#m[/ch]  [ch]D[/ch]
Your beautiful soul, yeah[/tab]


[Ending]

[tab]                       [ch]A[/ch]      [ch]E[/ch]
I don't want another pretty face[/tab]
[tab]                   [ch]F#m[/ch]       [ch]D[/ch]
I don't want just anyone to hold[/tab]
[tab]                 [ch]F#m[/ch]              [ch]E[/ch]

[tab]       [ch]A[/ch]       [ch]A/C#[/ch]  [ch]D[/ch]             [ch]A[/ch] [ch]E[/ch] [ch]F#m[/ch] [ch]D[/ch]
I want you and your  beautiful soul     oh[/tab]
